eventTitle: Arizona Iced Tea price increase in 2026?
marketQuestion: Arizona Iced Tea price increase in 2026?
settlementText: If Arizona Iced Tea has a national price increase of anything greater than 0% announced before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.

If Bitcoin outperforms gold in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

The performance of gold will be determined by using ICE Data Service's prices provided by a variety of financial institutions. The performance of Bitcoin will be determined by using the 60-second average of CF Benchmarks' Bitcoin Real-Time Index.

eventTitle: Will Apple Music's Individual Plan increase before 2027?
marketQuestion: Will Apple Music's Individual Plan increase before 2027?
settlementText:
If Apple Music Individual Plan (Monthly) has a national price increase of anything greater than 0% announced before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.

As of November 6, 2025, the Apple music Individual Plan costs $10.99 per month.
